statement.en: What makes other path users uncomfortable with micromobility devices? : investigating survey comments using structural topic modelling
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint/thesis (embargo status) with abstract withheld. The empirical claim (path user discomfort with micromobility) is real and measurable, but the specific findings are not yet publicly available for verification. The research methodology (structural topic modeling) is established, but conclusions remain provisional pending full publication and peer review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 声なき不安が、見えぬものの積分に還元される。
